// FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : JINDAL STEEL SOHAR LLC // STEEL ROUNDS, 25,619 MT +/-5% CHOPT // SOHAR - JUBAIL // LAYCAN : 12 - 14 DEC\'25
Good Eve !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
The offer shall be submitted on the earliest basis
latest by Decemeber 03, 11000 Hrs  Hrs Oman
Time and will be finalized on December 3 or 4
This shipment will go in one vessesl ,Two vessels option is not there
Full Terms attached with this email.
1. Please submit the offer as per attached FN
2. Owner must follow below specs of the vessel at the time of nomination -
a) Description of Ship to be nominated : Hatch Opening : 18-20 Meter
b) Hatch coaming must be less than 3 meter
c) AFT - FWD -  min 18 meter
d) ATHWART - min 14 meter
e) All Shipcrane must be fully functional at full capacity & in proper condition and all ship cranes must be provided for loading
d) Port Captain or Owner Representative must be available all the time during loading. (Port Captain must be appointted as per consent of charterers)
e) Vessel Age max 25 years, no forklift operations at load port,
f)
Vessel Should have the capacity for loading complete cargo in positive tolernace.
3. Fixture Note terms are fixed and non- negotiatble. No change acceptable in the FN terms of cluases.
In case of any deviation in the specs, owners will discuss with the Jindal Shadeed Chartering Team & Terminal team and get the acceptance from Jindal Shadeed. In case proposed vessel is rejected, owner need to nominate another vessel within 24 hours.
Please do submit the offer within given timelines.
ACCT : JINDAL STEEL SOHAR LLC,OMAN
